name: ESP32-C6 SuperMini
notes: ESP32-C6 SuperMini (MakerGO): 22.5 x 18 mm, bare ESP32-C6FH4 with a PCB trace antenna, USB-C, on-board LiPo charger. 20 GPIOs on two 10-pin castellated rows at 2.54 mm.
Same outline as the ESP32-C3 SuperMini but a completely different GPIO map - do not reuse a C3 SuperMini pinout here.
GPIO15 drives the blue user LED; GPIO8 drives the WS2812 RGB LED.
GPIO12/13 (USB D-/D+) and GPIO21/22/23 sit on unpopulated inner pads, not on the headers.

15.label: LED
15.note: Blue user LED. Also a strapping pin, so avoid holding it at boot.

8.label: RGB
8.note: Drives the on-board WS2812 RGB LED. Also a strapping pin.

9.label: BOOT
9.note: Wired to the BOOT button. Held LOW at reset it enters the download mode.
